results.rendered_html: unmārga (ud + mārga) m. Abweg: madonmattasya bhūpasya kuñjarasya ca gacchataḥ . unmārge vācyatāṃ yānti mahāmātrāḥ samīpagāḥ ..  PAÑCAT. I, 177 . unmārgagamana  SUŚR. 2,355,20 . ˚gāmin  MBH. 14,1187 .  HIT. Pr. 40 . 4,12 . ˚yāta IV, 16 . ˚vṛtti  KATHĀS. 22,239 . ˚vartin  RĀJA-TAR. 5,209 .

results.rendered_html:
unmārga a. [utkrāṃtaḥ mārgāt] Going to a wrong path.
— rgaḥ
1 A wrong road, deviation from the right road (fig. also); nityamunmārgagāmināṃ  Pt. 1. 
2 An improper conduct, evil course, moral turpitude; unmārgaprasthitāni iṃdriyāṇi  K. 155 ; ˚pravartakaḥ 103. 
— rgaṃ ind. Astray, by a wrong way;  Pt. 1. 161. 
Comp.
— gata a. going wrong.
— gamanaṃ following evil courses.
— gāmin, -vartin a. going wrong, erring, taking a wrong road.
